summary: Iteration 64 - Background Report Generation Pattern Verified. The fix for proxy timeout has been successfully implemented. POST /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/generate now returns immediately with status='generating' (tested in <2s). Polling endpoint GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id}/status works correctly. Frontend shows progress indicator during generation and polls every 4 seconds until completion (~55s for Quick Summary).

issues: Minor: Missing DialogContent aria-describedby (React console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py Lines 4221-4252: _run_report_generation() background task correctly updates status to 'completed' or 'failed'
server.py Lines 4256-4329: generate_report() correctly creates placeholder with status='generating' and fires asyncio.create_task()
server.py Lines 4332-4342: get_report_status() polling endpoint returns proper status field
ReportsSection.jsx Lines 160-237: Proper polling logic with 4s interval, 5min max wait, handles completed/failed states
ReportsSection.jsx Line 334: Reports correctly filtered to exclude generating/failed status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Background report generation pattern is working. The generate endpoint returns in <2s with status='generating'. Frontend polls /status endpoint every 4s. Reports complete in 30-90s depending on type. Old reports without 'status' field still display correctly. All polling and completion flows verified working.

backend_api_tests.get_reports_list: PASS - Lists all reports including legacy ones

frontend_ui_tests.report_dialog_options: PASS - All 3 options displayed with correct prices
frontend_ui_tests.progress_indicator: PASS - Shows during generation with progress bar
